name: Incident Commander
summary: A scoped agent that triages incidents across Sentry + PagerDuty + logs and proposes next steps.
description: Installs an agents/incident-commander/ charter + run.py that, on demand, pulls open Sentry issues, PagerDuty incidents + on-call, and local nightly/error logs, then produces ONE ranked 'what's on fire and what do I do' posture. The natural capstone agent for a control center -- turns several read-only integrations into a single answer. Degrades to logs-only if the integrations aren't installed.

requires.label: Best with the sentry and/or pagerduty extensions installed (works logs-only without them)
